trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Shrek 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027.
______
 
Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.  
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of

trending_videos.title: Hexed | Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Welcome to Hexe, the world of witches. Disney’s #Hexed is only in theaters November 25

The first trailer and poster for Disney’s “Hexed,” an all-new magical coming-of-age saga releasing in theaters November 25, are now available. The original animated film is Walt Disney Animation Studios’ 65th animated feature.
 
Joining previously announced voice cast members Hailee Steinfeld and Rashida Jones are seven-time Emmy Award® winner Tracey Ullman (“The Tracey Ullman Show,” “Tracey Takes On…,” “Bullets Over Broadway,” “Robin Hood: Men in Tights”), who voices the enchanted feather quill pen Ms. Quill, and Stephen Fry (“Gosford Park,” “Wilde,” “Jeeves and Wooster,” “V for Vendetta,” “The Hobbit” trilogy) as the magical journal Elias Quire.

trending_videos.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
trending_videos.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil S

Try Zocdoc for FREE by clicking here - https://zocdoc.com/heavyspoilers 

SPIDERMAN Brand New Day Official Trailer Breakdown | Easter Eggs, Story Explained & Things You Missed. We breakdown the Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer. This discusses the comic book story, Bruce Banner, Grey Hulk, Punisher, Sadie Sinks character Jean Grey, MJ, the comics and more.

#Spiderman #BrandNewDay #Trailer #SpidermanBrandNewDay #Marvel #MCU #PlotDetails #PlotLeak #MovieTrailer #sponsored 

Spider-Man: Brand New Day is an upcoming American superhero film based on the Marvel Comics character Spider-Man. Produced by Columbia Pictures, Marvel Studios, and Pascal Pictures, and distributed by Sony Pictures Releasing, it is intended to be the 38th film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) and the fourth film in the MCU Spider-Man film series following Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021). The film is being directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, written by Chris McKenna and Erik Sommers, and stars Tom Holland as Peter

videos_without_transcripts.title: POOR vs RICH: Treehouse Battle in Minecraft

high_viewership.insight: The average views per video among the trending content is high, indicating significant engagement with each piece of content.

dominance_of_trailers.insight: 50% of the trending videos are trailers, suggesting a strong audience interest in upcoming films and entertainment content.

gaming_and_challenges.insight: 30% of the trending videos involve gaming content or challenge-based content, highlighting a consistent audience interest in interactive and entertaining formats.

diversity_of_creators.insight: The trending content is produced by a variety of creators, indicating a diverse set of influences and appeal across different audience segments.

single_video_per_channel.insight: Each top channel has only one video in the trending list, suggesting that the trend is driven by individual high-performing videos rather than sustained output by any particular channel.

capitalize_on_trailer_trends.actionable_insight: Content creators and marketers can focus on producing high-quality trailer content or breakdowns to leverage the existing audience interest in upcoming movies and series.

gaming_and_interactive_content.actionable_insight: There is a clear opportunity to produce more gaming and challenge-based content, potentially collaborating with streamers and gaming influencers to reach engaged audiences.

cross-promotion.actionable_insight: Given the diversity in trending content, creators should explore cross-promotional opportunities with channels from different genres to tap into varied audience bases.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
